hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); r=subprocess.run(['python','-m','py_compile',f],capture_output=True,text=True) if f.endswith('.py') else None; print('Syntax OK: '+f) if r and r.returncode==0 else (print('SYNTAXFEHLER: '+r.stderr) if r else None)" 2>/dev/null || true
